narrative:
Waynesfield-Goshen Local Sd (Auglaize) school district has 1,847 registered voters, with 50.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.4 percentage points.
